## Signal variable

The gateway to signal APIs.

**Signature:**

```typescript
Signal: Readonly<{
    subscribe(signal: string, subscriber: Subscriber): void;
    unsubscribe(signal: string, subscriber: Subscriber): void;
    send(signal: string): void;
}>
```
